name: combobox
description: Searchable single-select input. Composes Popover + Command (cmdk) + a styled trigger. Pass a list of { value, label } options.

props.name: options
props.description: Array of { value: string, label: string, disabled?: boolean }

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback when the user picks an option: (value: string) => void

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Text shown on the trigger when nothing is selected

props.name: emptyText
props.description: Shown inside the list when the search has no matches

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible label — required when no adjacent visible label is used

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: Id of an external visible label that names the combobox

examples.title: Framework picker
examples.description: Searchable single-select with a small static list

ai.whenToUse: Use for a select input when the list is >~8 items or users benefit from typing to narrow. Fuzzy search + keyboard nav + selected-item checkmark.
ai.whenNotToUse: Don't use for native-select parity on mobile (use Select). Don't use for multi-select (this component is single-value — compose Command + Popover yourself for multi). Don't use for free-text entry (use Input).
commonMistakes: Passing duplicate option values (breaks selection and filtering)
Two options with identical labels — cmdk dedupes by the Item's filter value (the label here), so one will be dropped from the list
Using the label as the value — fine if stable, but prefer a short stable `value` string
Forgetting to bind value + onChange — uncontrolled mode doesn't exist on this wrapper
Mixing translated labels without keying on value — label changes won't update selection
Missing aria-label / aria-labelledby — role='combobox' does not allow name from contents, so without one of these the trigger has no accessible name
ai.accessibilityNotes: Trigger has role='combobox' + aria-expanded + aria-haspopup='listbox'. aria-controls points at the inner CommandList (a useId-stabilized listbox). Pass aria-label or aria-labelledby — combobox does not derive its name from contents.
